name: @aurabot/memory-pglite
description: AuraBot Memory v2 local PGlite engine.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/tests/*.test.js dist/tests/schema/*.test.js dist/tests/recent/*.test.js
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js smoke
scripts.schema:check: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js schema:check
